message:
fix: address 5 Copilot review findings on ACMM scan handler (#8616) (#8619)

- Use settings.ResolveGitHubTokenEnv() instead of raw os.Getenv
- Return HTTP 502 on upstream GitHub API failures instead of 200
- URL-encode branch name in trees API path (handles release/v1 etc.)
- Add User-Agent header to GitHub API requests
- Replace manual read loop with io.ReadAll(io.LimitReader()) to catch
  non-EOF read errors instead of silently returning truncated JSON

Fixes #8616

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
